OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Update the getAgentDetail function and show work expanded view to show rich information.

Update the expanded detail section for each agent. When show work is clicked, show a rich detail box:

For T-1000: show search query, then each source as a block with title (bold), highlight text, and URL link
For Hannibal: show sentiment badge, all key phrases as pill tags, sentiment scores breakdown
For Tyler Durden: show full read text, weight label, full commitment text
For Joker: show full avoided text, reframe text in italic, and the question in bold
For Thanos: show full truth text
For Agent Smith: show source language detected and confirmation of translation
For Gus Fring: show category, decision, and safety confirmation
For Bane: show country detected and crisis resource details
For Mike Ehrmantraut: show audio deletion confirmation
For Ra's al Ghul: show commitment preparation confirmation

Use this structure for each expanded item:
<div style={{background:'#f9f9f9', borderRadius:'6px', padding:'16px', marginTop:'8px', borderLeft:'3px solid #C4922A'}}>
  <p style={{fontSize:'12px', color:'#C4922A', fontWeight:500, margin:'0 0 8px', letterSpacing:'1px'}}>{characterName}</p>
  {/* rich content specific to each agent */}
</div>

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
T-1000 shows source titles, highlights, URLs
Hannibal shows phrases as pills and scores
Tyler Durden shows full texts
Joker shows all three fields
